entities.name: TEFF
entities.description: A cereal crop produced in South Wollo, Ethiopia

entities.name: SOUTH WOLLO, ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The geographical area in the Amhara region of Ethiopia where the study was conducted

entities.name: SIMULATION GAME
entities.description: A diagnostic tool designed to capture the impact of variable rainfall on teff production and commercialization

entities.name: VARIABLE RAINFALL
entities.description: A natural shock characterized by fluctuations in precipitation affecting crop growth

entities.name: COMMERCIALIZATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the sale of agricultural produce in the market

entities.name: PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing and harvesting teff

entities.name: REPLICABLE BUSINESS MODELS
entities.description: Business models focusing on reducing economic coordination, opportunism, and price risks

entities.name: NATURAL SHOCKS
entities.description: Unpredictable environmental events, such as variable rainfall, that pose risks to agriculture

entities.name: MARKET PRICES
entities.description: The monetary value of teff in the market, which influences farmers' sales decisions

entities.name: INORGANIC FERTILIZER
entities.description: Chemical inputs used by farmers to maintain teff production during adverse rainfall conditions

entities.name: RESOURCE CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Limitations on available inputs, such as land, that restrict agricultural production

entities.name: SHORTAGE OF LAND
entities.description: A specific resource constraint that limits the area available for teff production

entities.name: BELG
entities.description: The first wet season in the Ethiopian agricultural calendar

entities.name: MEHER
entities.description: The second and main wet season in the Ethiopian agricultural calendar
